title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Jones Lang LaSalle - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Jones Lang LaSalle - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Jones Lang LaSalle, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jones Lang LaSalle:
Jones Lang LaSalle is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jones Lang LaSalle!
